prompt: Create a highly detailed vertical anime-style illustration of a young Japanese man standing on a perfectly reflective shallow water surface at sunset, viewed from a low angle with a vast dramatic sky filling most of the frame. He wears an elegant white kimono with subtle silver floral embroidery near the hem and sleeves, a vivid red patterned obi sash with tassels hanging at his back, white tabi socks, and traditional wooden geta sandals. His short dark hair is swept by the wind, and his face is softly indistinct and unfeatured, turned downward in a calm contemplative pose. He holds a large traditional Japanese paper umbrella, deep blue, by a long black handle; the umbrella is open but tilted downward so its rim touches the mirrorlike water, creating a clear reflection. Include exactly 1 person, exactly 1 open umbrella, exactly 1 red obi sash, exactly 2 tassel ornaments, and exactly 2 geta sandals, all mirrored below in the water. The background is an expansive luminous blue sky with scattered glowing clouds, golden sun rays bursting from the low horizon on the left, distant mountains and a thin lake horizon line. Emphasize breathtaking reflections of the sky, sun, figure, kimono, and umbrella on the water, with crisp highlights and ripples only where the umbrella touches. Use vibrant saturated blues, warm golden backlight, cinematic composition, intricate fabric folds, delicate umbrella ribs, painterly anime fantasy realism, ultra-clean linework, high resolution, no text, no watermark, no border.
